lib.description: Visual utilities and shared sub-components. Installed by `npx taw-ui init`.

kpi-card.name: KpiCard
kpi-card.description: Single metric display with animated value counting, trend delta, and source attribution.

option-list.name: OptionList
option-list.description: Interactive single or multi-select with keyboard navigation and receipt pattern.

data-table.name: DataTable
data-table.description: Sortable table with rich column formatting — currency, percent, delta, badges.

link-card.name: LinkCard
link-card.description: Rich link preview with Open Graph metadata, favicon, and AI reasoning.

memory-card.name: MemoryCard
memory-card.description: Transparent AI memory viewer with per-item confidence and review verdicts.

insight-card.name: InsightCard
insight-card.description: Structured AI analysis with key metrics and sentiment-coded recommendation.

alert-card.name: AlertCard
alert-card.description: Proactive AI notification with severity levels and action buttons.
